title: Morning Running 晨跑
scene: Dad带Ben去公园晨跑，锻炼身体。

lines.en: Ben, wake up! It is time for our morning run.
Oh Dad, I am so sleepy. Can I sleep more?
lines.zh: 噢爸爸，我好困。能多睡一会儿吗？

lines.en: Come on! Running makes you strong and healthy.
lines.zh: 快点！跑步让你强壮又健康。

lines.en: OK, OK. Give me one minute.
Let us stretch first. Touch your toes.
lines.zh: 我们先拉伸一下。弯腰摸脚趾。

lines.en: It is normal. Now let us jog slowly.
lines.zh: 这很正常。现在我们慢慢跑起来。

lines.en: Wow, the morning air is so fresh.
Yes! Let us run two laps around the park.
lines.zh: 是啊！我们在公园跑两圈吧。

lines.en: I feel great now. Running is not bad!
lines.zh: 我现在感觉很好。跑步还不错！
